title: Explore and Learn
motivation: Discover a domain of interest, build foundational knowledge, and develop initial capabilities through research and exploration.

goals.title: Identify learning domain
goals.description: Work with the user to define the domain, or research broadly to discover interesting topics. Build initial knowledge in the collective knowledge tree.

outcomes: At least one L2 node exists in the knowledge tree with foundational domain knowledge

checks.condition: Has at least one L2 node registered
